name: Indigo Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I We are a blank check company incorporated on June 7, 2024 in the Cayman Islands as an exempted company, for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities (a Business Combination). Our sponsor is Indigo Sponsor Group, LLC, an entity affiliated with our officers and directors (the Sponsor). On June7, 2024, we issued an aggregate of 2,875,000 ordinary shares to EBC H...
